title: Digital Water Operations Platform
entry_mechanism: Saudi digital company developing water operations AI platform anchored by SWCC and Saudi Water Authority
executive_summary:
Digital water operations — AI-powered platforms that optimise desalination plant performance, predict membrane fouling, schedule maintenance, and manage water distribution networks — are the highest-value service layer in the water sector. Saudi Arabia's water infrastructure generates enormous operational data (plant sensors, water quality monitors, distribution pressure sensors) that today is managed by legacy SCADA systems with limited analytics capability.

Node DT-5 targets a Saudi-developed Digital Water Operations Platform: Saudi data scientists and water engineers building predictive models for Saudi-specific desalination conditions (Red Sea and Arabian Gulf feed water characteristics, extreme ambient temperatures) and deploying an AI-powered water operations platform that SWCC and Saudi Water Authority use to optimise their national water network.

The global digital water market was valued at $15.8 billion in 2024 growing at 12.4% CAGR. Saudi Arabia's unique combination of the world's largest desalination capacity and a national digital transformation ambition creates a compelling domestic market. A Saudi digital water platform that proves itself on SWCC's operations has strong export potential across MENA's water-stressed nations.

companies.name: Xylem / Idrica
companies.rationale: Idrica (Xylem subsidiary) provides GoAigua digital water platform deployed globally. Technology licensing for Saudi platform.

companies.name: IBM Water Intelligence
companies.rationale: IBM has water analytics and AI operations platforms with global deployments. IBM Cloud sovereign deployment model.

companies.name: Siemens Digital Industries / Water
companies.rationale: Siemens provides digital twin platforms for water infrastructure with SWCC relationships.
companies.contact: Siemens VP Water Digitalisation, Middle East

companies.name: Bentley Systems
companies.rationale: Bentley provides water network modelling and digital twin tools widely used by utilities.

companies.name: Halma Water Analytics
companies.rationale: Halma subsidiary produces water quality monitoring and analytics for utilities.

partners.name: Saudi Water Company (SWCC)
partners.current: Legacy SCADA; limited analytics; large operational data archive
partners.upgrade: SWCC as development partner; operational data access for platform development; SWCC 10-year platform licensing commitment; SWCC engineers embedded in development team

partners.name: Saudi Aramco Digital
partners.current: Industrial AI platform; predictive maintenance expertise
partners.upgrade: Transfer Aramco predictive maintenance AI methodology to water operations domain; Saudi water industry digital twin framework; dual-use industrial/water AI platform

partners.name: KAUST / Water Research
partners.current: Desalination process research; water quality analytics research
partners.upgrade: KAUST-SWCC digital water research programme; RO membrane performance prediction models; Saudi Red Sea and Gulf feedwater characterisation models

partners.name: SDAIA
partners.upgrade: Water operational data sovereignty framework; Saudi water AI certification standard; SWCC data as national critical infrastructure
